description:
You are acting as a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) starting your shift. Your inbox contains a mix of alerts and general chatter. Perform a triage pass by creating folders named 'Triage/Critical' and 'Triage/Warning'. Categorize the inbox by moving emails with subjects containing 'error', 'fail', 'failure', or 'fatal' to the Critical folder, and emails with subjects containing 'check', 'review', or 'warning' to the Warning folder. Identify and move at least 5 relevant emails in total. Acknowledge one incident by replying to a sender of a Critical email with the text: 'Acknowledged, investigating now.' Finally, send a 'Shift Handover Summary' email to sre-leads@company.com reporting the counts of emails moved in the following format:
Critical Issues: [Number]
Warnings: [Number]
Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
